title: invoice — realtime broadcast channels
description: Four broadcast channel families for live UI updates. Tenant-wide channel powers the admin invoice dashboard; customer channel powers the customer-facing 'my invoices' view; per-invoice line channel supports collaborative draft-invoice editing; per-invoice credit-note channel updates the credit-note list when new credits are issued. Reverb (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport; notifications module handles fanout.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.invoices
channels.description: Tenant-wide invoice activity stream. Sink for the admin invoice dashboard showing new invoices + status transitions + collection-status changes.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (finance role OR admin OR owner OR support)
channels.notes: Payload trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). Revenue values (total_cents) are broadcast to admin + finance role only; support role sees the invoice number + status but not the total.

channels.name: customer.{customerType}.{customerId}.invoices
channels.description: Customer-scoped invoice activity. Powers the customer's own 'my invoices' view — new invoice notifications, payment confirmations, refunds visible in real time.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (auth.user.id == customerId OR auth.user is guardian_of(customerId))
channels.notes: Only fires events for invoices where invoice.customer_id == customerId. The Broadcasts channel guard is defense-in-depth alongside invoice.enforce_customer_scope middleware.

channels.name: invoice.{invoiceId}.lines
channels.description: Per-invoice line activity. Powers collaborative draft-invoice editing (two admins adding lines at the same time see each other's updates in real time). Only active while parent invoice.status='draft'.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (finance role OR admin OR owner) AND invoice.status='draft'
channels.notes: Channel unsubscribes automatically when invoice transitions to 'open' (via a broadcast unsubscribe hook fired in InvoiceObserver.updating). No events fire on finalized invoices.

channels.name: invoice.{invoiceId}.credit-notes
channels.description: Per-invoice credit-note activity. Powers the credit-note list within an invoice detail view.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (finance role OR admin OR owner OR support OR (customer AND invoice.customer_id == auth.user.id))
channels.notes: Customers subscribed to this channel see credit notes issued against their own invoices in real time — useful for refund flows where the customer expects the credit to appear immediately.
